ownerCta.headline: Own a property in Morocco and want to rent or sell?

Areas.title: Headquartered in Europe. Operating across Morocco.
Areas.description: With offices in Oslo, London, and four cities across Morocco, we combine international standards with deep local knowledge to manage your property wherever you are.

hero.title: A Professional Approach to Real Estate
hero.subtitle: We combine real estate expertise with design, marketing, and technology to deliver a modern and professional property experience.

philosophy.title: Our Approach
philosophy.body1: Real estate is not just about listing properties. It is about presenting homes in a way that reflects their true value.
philosophy.body2: Many agencies publish listings quickly with limited information, poor images, and little attention to presentation.
philosophy.body3: Our process focuses on quality and professionalism. Each property goes through a structured preparation process including photography, design, and carefully written descriptions.
philosophy.body4: This ensures that buyers understand the property clearly and sellers achieve the best possible exposure.

difference.title: What Makes Us Different
difference.subtitle: Five key principles that define how we work and why clients trust us with their most valuable assets.

photography.title: Professional Property Photography
photography.description: Every property is presented with high-quality photography that highlights space, lighting, and architectural details.

descriptions.title: Structured Property Descriptions
descriptions.description: Our listings include clear and detailed descriptions so buyers can understand the property before visiting.

international.title: International Experience
international.description: Our team brings experience from international markets and applies global standards to property presentation and service.

client.title: Client-First Approach
client.description: We prioritize transparency, communication, and long-term relationships with our clients.

fullService.title: Full-Service Support
fullService.description: From listing preparation to final transaction, our team supports clients throughout the entire process.

team.title: A Multidisciplinary Team
team.description: Delivering high-quality property listings requires more than real estate agents. Our team includes professionals from several disciplines who work together to present each property in the best possible way.

agents.title: Real Estate Agents
agents.description: Experts in the local market who guide clients through buying and selling decisions.

photographers.title: Photographers
photographers.description: Professionals who capture each property with the correct lighting and composition.

designers.title: Design Specialists
designers.description: Designers who structure listings so that the presentation is clean, modern, and visually appealing.

technical.title: Technical Team
technical.description: Engineers who maintain the digital platform and ensure property information is presented accurately.

marketing.title: Marketing Specialists
marketing.description: Professionals who ensure properties reach the right audience through digital marketing and promotion.

standards.title: Professional Standards for Every Listing
standards.description: We follow a consistent professional standard for every property we represent.

items.presentation: Consistent professional presentation across all platforms

international.title: International Perspective
international.body1: Our team brings experience from international markets and diverse professional backgrounds.
international.body2: This global perspective allows us to understand different buyer expectations and cultural preferences. By applying international standards, we create listings that appeal to both local and international buyers.
international.body3: This approach helps sellers reach a wider audience and ensures a more professional real estate experience.

commitment.title: Our Clients Come First
commitment.body1: Our work is built on trust and long-term relationships.
commitment.body2: We take the time to understand our clients' goals and guide them through every stage of the process with honesty, transparency, and professional advice.
commitment.body3: Deliver exceptional service and represent every property with the highest level of professionalism.

digitalPartner.title: Powered by Xala Technologies
digitalPartner.body1: AtlasStays partners with Xala Technologies — a Norwegian innovation leader trusted by the UN, UNICEF, USAID, Statistics Norway, and major Nordic enterprises — to power our digital infrastructure.
digitalPartner.body2: Xala combines AI, cloud technology, and modern web development to deliver secure, scalable solutions. Their expertise in React, Next.js, and TypeScript ensures our platform is fast, reliable, and built to grow with your business.
digitalPartner.body3: For property owners, this means enterprise-grade security, GDPR compliance, and a platform designed for the long term. Your listings, data, and guest communications are protected by the same standards used by global institutions.
digitalPartner.card_ai_desc: Smart automation and insights that streamline operations and enhance guest experiences.
digitalPartner.card_cloud_desc: Secure, scalable hosting on Azure and AWS for 99.9% uptime.
digitalPartner.card_trust_desc: The same technology stack that serves UN agencies, Nordic banks, and healthcare networks powers AtlasStays.

faq.title: Common questions
faq.subtitle: Clear answers to reduce your concerns.

buyers_contact.a: No. All buyer inquiries, calls, and messages go through us. We screen and qualify buyers before you're involved. You stay informed without being interrupted.

viewings.a: We do. We coordinate and attend all viewings on-site. You don't need to be present — we represent you and report back after each visit.

commission.a: Commission is paid by the buyer, not by you. There is no upfront listing fee and no hidden marketing costs. Everything is defined in a written mandate before we start.

timeline.q: How long does the process take?
timeline.a: Typically 2–4 months for well-priced properties. We give you a realistic timeline during the initial valuation. Market conditions and pricing affect the speed.

notaries.a: Yes. We coordinate directly with the notary — document preparation, verification, and closing logistics. We ensure everything is ready for your signature.

documents.a: We'll provide a complete checklist. Typically: title deed, tax certificates, and ID. We handle verification and notary preparation. You won't chase paperwork alone.

abroad.q: Can I sell while living abroad?
abroad.a: Yes. We're built for owners abroad. We handle everything on-site. You only need to sign at the notary — we can arrange a power of attorney if you can't travel.

items.quote_1: AtlasStays took care of everything — from listing to guest communication and cleaning. I live abroad and never had to worry. Highly recommend.
items.quote_2: Professional, transparent, and reliable. The photo reports after every stay give me peace of mind. My property is in great hands.
items.quote_3: Finally, a management company that actually delivers. No hidden fees, clear communication, and my occupancy has never been better.
items.quote_4: From day one, everything was handled professionally. I get monthly reports and never have to chase anyone. Best decision for my property.

points.flat_percentage: We charge a flat percentage of your property's monthly earnings, so we only succeed when you do.
points.no_hidden_costs: All cleaning, maintenance, and listing fees are included in our service fee. No surprise charges.
points.guest_pays_fees: All booking-related fees are covered by the guests, so you don't pay anything upfront.

faq.title: Common questions
faq.subtitle: Clear answers about our short-term rental management.

platforms.q: Which platforms do you list on?
platforms.a: We list on Airbnb, Booking.com, VRBO, Expedia, Hotels.com, and local platforms. Your property gets maximum visibility across all major channels.

cleaning.q: How do I know the cleaner actually showed up?
cleaning.a: Every turnover includes a photo report sent directly to you. We verify each cleaning and inspection. No-show cleaners are not an option — we track and confirm every visit.

support.q: What if a guest has an issue at 3AM?
support.a: We offer optional 24/7 guest support in English, French, and Arabic. Emergencies are handled by our team so you never get midnight calls.

reporting.q: How do I track revenue and expenses?
reporting.a: You receive monthly revenue and occupancy reports, plus an expense breakdown with receipts. Full transparency. Optional real-time dashboard access.

abroad.q: Can I manage my property from abroad?
abroad.a: Yes. We're built for owners abroad. We handle everything on-site — listing, guests, cleaning, keys, and maintenance. You stay informed through reports and updates.

pricing.a: We offer flexible packages: Starter (cleaning + inspection + photo report), Care (adds linen and restocking), and Full Management (revenue-based). See our pricing page for details.

cta.title: List your property with full management.
cta.subtitle: We handle everything from listing to guest support. You earn. We manage.

descriptions.riad_palm: Riad Palm is a beautifully restored traditional Moroccan riad located in the heart of the Marrakech medina. The property features an open courtyard with a central fountain, hand-carved plaster detailing, and zellige tilework throughout. With spacious rooms arranged around the courtyard, this riad offers an authentic living experience combined with modern comfort.
descriptions.villa_atlas: Villa Atlas is a contemporary residence with panoramic views and premium finishes. The open-plan living spaces flow seamlessly onto a landscaped terrace with a private pool. The villa combines modern architecture with traditional Moroccan craftsmanship, featuring tadelakt walls, handmade cement tiles, and floor-to-ceiling windows that flood every room with natural light.
descriptions.medina_view: Medina View is a bright and airy apartment perched above the old town, offering sweeping views of the medina rooftops and the sea beyond. Recently renovated with contemporary materials while preserving the building's historic character, the apartment features an open kitchen, generous living space, and a private rooftop terrace ideal for entertaining.
descriptions.kasbah_house: Kasbah House is a characterful property situated within walking distance of the historic kasbah quarter. Thick rammed-earth walls keep the interior cool in summer and warm in winter. The house has been thoughtfully updated with a modern kitchen, en-suite bathrooms, and underfloor heating, while retaining original carved cedar doors and painted wooden ceilings.
descriptions.ocean_retreat: Ocean Retreat is a coastal villa designed for relaxed living, with direct views of the Atlantic from every principal room. The grounds include a heated infinity pool, mature gardens, and a covered outdoor dining area. Inside, the interiors are finished with natural stone, reclaimed wood, and locally sourced textiles that create a calm, resort-like atmosphere.
descriptions.city_residence: City Residence is a modern apartment in a well-maintained building in the commercial heart of the city. The layout prioritizes functionality with a separate home office, a bright kitchen with integrated appliances, and generous storage throughout. Floor-to-ceiling windows bring in plenty of light, and the building offers secure parking and a rooftop communal terrace.

locations.marrakech: Located in Marrakech, Morocco's most popular destination for property investment. The city combines historic charm with a growing international community, world-class restaurants, and excellent transport links via Menara Airport.
locations.casablanca: Situated in Casablanca, Morocco's economic capital and largest city. The area offers excellent infrastructure, international schools, a thriving business district, and direct connections to Europe and beyond.
locations.tangier: Based in Tangier, a cosmopolitan port city at the meeting point of the Atlantic and Mediterranean. The city has undergone significant modernization while retaining its artistic heritage and strategic position just 14km from Spain.
locations.agadir: Located in Agadir, Morocco's premier beach resort city on the Atlantic coast. Known for its year-round sunshine, modern marina, and relaxed lifestyle, Agadir attracts both holiday buyers and long-term residents.
